arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. West Ham United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: West Ham may approach Sérgio Conceição to replace Julen Lopetegui
arts.sum: Portuguese left Porto after winning three titles Lopetegui under pressure after Arsenal rout West Ham are considering Sergio Conceição as a replacement for Julen Lopetegui, whose future as manager is under growing pressure after his team’s 5-2 defeat at home against Arsenal last Saturday. The Guardian revealed last month that the Spaniard’s position hinged on results against Newcastle and Arsenal, with defeats in both outings likely to have resulted in his dismissal. Lopetegui, hired as David Moyes’s replacement last summer, met the challenge by recording an impressive 2-0 win at Newcastle. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham and Crystal Palace 'Want to Hold Talks' to Sign McAtee
arts.sum: West Ham United and Crystal Palace are eager to open discussions over a January move for James McAtee

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy at work changing Leicester's 'style'
arts.sum: Newly-appointed manager Ruud van Nistelrooy is aiming to bring a sense of positivity to Leicester City and quickly make an impression on the Premier League club's players, as he looks to ensure that they remain in the English top flight.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy admits 'big issue' with Jamie Vardy over broken record
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy finds himself coaching Jamie Vardy at Leicester City - with the Foxes man previously beating his Premier League record for goals in consecutive games

arts.ttl: FA Cup third round draw LIVE: Updates as Liverpool, Manchester United and Premier League sides learn fate
arts.sum: A total of 64 sides will found out their opponents for the next round, with all Championship and Premier League sides entering the draw

arts.ttl: Ex Wales and Sunderland head coach Chris Coleman outlines ambitions with Leicester City sister club OH Leuven: ‘I do not see why we cannot compete for the top six in the long term’
arts.sum: Chris Coleman is the new head coach of struggling OH Leuven. The side, joined in partnership with Leicester City, have struggled to find consistency this season. As reported by HLN,…

arts.ttl: How Maresca persuaded Van Nistelrooy to take up Leicester job
arts.sum: Ruud Van Nistelrooy admitted that his ‘great friend’ Enzo Maresca played a key role in...

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy 'astonished' that short Man Utd stint has led to Leicester job
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has found himself a job at Leicester City following Steve Cooper's thanking and has thanked Manchester United for helping put him back on the managerial map

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui pays Ruud van Nistelrooy compliment as West Ham face Leicester City's new manager
arts.sum: Lopetegui praised van Nistelrooy's credentials, saying, "I think that Ruud is a very good manager – he has shown this before in the teams that he has worked and he has experience in the Premier League. West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui has acknowledged the tough task ahead as his team prepares to take on Leicester City in Ruud van Nistelrooy's managerial debut.
